Package com.dtwthalion.ttio.hdf5

Class Hdf5Dataset

java.lang.Object
com.dtwthalion.ttio.hdf5.Hdf5Dataset
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
public class Hdf5Dataset extends Object implements AutoCloseable
Thin wrapper around a 1-D HDF5 dataset. Owns its dataset id; released in close().

Datasets are created with a definite element count and precision; the shape cannot be resized after creation.

Since:
0.5

  • Method Details

    • getDatasetId

      public long getDatasetId()

    • getPrecision

      public Enums.Precision getPrecision()

    • getLength

      public long getLength()

    • writeData

      public void writeData(Object data)
      Write all elements.

      The data parameter type depends on the precision:

      • FLOAT32: float[]
      • FLOAT64: double[]
      • INT32: int[]
      • INT64: long[]
      • UINT32: int[] (interpreted as unsigned)
      • COMPLEX128: double[] with length 2*N (re,im pairs)
      Parameters:
      data - array of the appropriate primitive type for this dataset's precision

    • readData

      public Object readData()
      Read all elements. Return type matches the precision (see writeData(java.lang.Object)).

    • readData

      public Object readData(long offset, long count)
      Read a hyperslab: count elements starting at offset.

    • close

      public void close()
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
